faq.question: Can I change plans mid-month?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade anytime. Fees will be pro-rated.
faq.answer_en: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade anytime. Fees will be pro-rated.

faq.question: Is my data secure?
faq.answer: All data is encrypted with AES-256 and stored on servers in India. Compliant with the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (DPDP Act).
faq.answer_en: All data is encrypted with AES-256, stored on servers in India. Compliant with Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (DPDP).

faq.question: Does Legal AI Agent replace a lawyer?
faq.question_en: Does Legal AI Agent replace a lawyer?
faq.answer: No. Legal AI Agent is a support tool to save time and costs. Complex cases still require consultation with a qualified advocate.
faq.answer_en: No. Legal AI Agent is a support tool to save time and costs. Complex cases still require lawyer consultation.

faq.question: Is Hindi supported?
faq.answer: The interface supports English. Hindi support is coming soon. Legal content covers Indian Central and State legislation.
faq.answer_en: The interface supports English. Hindi support is coming soon. Legal content covers Indian Central and State legislation.
